name: Ham-Cheese Cornucopias
recipeIngredient: 1 recipe Sour Cream Pastry, recipe below
1 pound cooked ham, sliced 5/8 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
Special equipment: 2-1/2-inch round cookie cutter.
Prepare the sour cream dough by combining all pastry ingredients. Knead lightly, then roll it out 1/4 inch thick.
Cut the ham into sticks 5/8 inch x 1-1/2 inches.
Spread the Boursin cheese lightly over the entire surface of the dough. Cut 30 rounds of dough with the cookie cutter. Place a ham stick in the center of each circle. Fold the bottom edges together and press lightly to form a cornucopia. Bake on a well-greased baking sheet for 15 to 20 minutes at 350°F.
